mapper.sql: id, issue_no, occur_time, handle_date, customer_name, description, kernel_version, status, category, key_site, site_type, mgmt_deploy, kernel_deploy, rl, ops_ticket, ecare_ticket, biz_interrupt, urgent_recover, remark, has_alarm, alarm_trigger, find_remark, perceive_time, create_time, swat_start_time, bound_time, biz_recover_time, full_recover_time, time_remark, doc_link, screen_link, had_plan, has_plan, plan_name, created_at, updated_at

where.if: AND (customer_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR issue_no ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM issues
ORDER BY occur_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE occur_time::DATE = #{date}::DATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO issues ( issue_no, occur_time, handle_date, customer_name, description, kernel_version, status, category, key_site, site_type, mgmt_deploy, kernel_deploy, rl, ops_ticket, ecare_ticket, biz_interrupt, urgent_recover, remark, has_alarm, alarm_trigger, find_remark, perceive_time, create_time, swat_start_time, bound_time, biz_recover_time, full_recover_time, time_remark, doc_link, screen_link, had_plan, has_plan, plan_name, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{issueNo}, NULLIF(#{occurTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, NULLIF(#{handleDate},'')::DATE, #{customerName}, #{description}, #{kernelVersion}, #{status}, #{category}, #{keySite}, #{siteType}, #{mgmtDeploy}, #{kernelDeploy}, #{rl}, #{opsTicket}, #{ecareTicket}, #{bizInterrupt}, #{urgentRecover}, #{remark}, #{hasAlarm}, #{alarmTrigger}, #{findRemark}, NULLIF(#{perceiveTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, NULLIF(#{createTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, NULLIF(#{swatStartTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, NULLIF(#{boundTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, NULLIF(#{bizRecoverTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, NULLIF(#{fullRecoverTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, #{timeRemark}, #{docLink}, #{screenLink}, #{hadPlan}, #{hasPlan}, #{planName}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE issues SET occur_time = #{occurTime}::TIMESTAMP, handle_date = NULLIF(#{handleDate},'')::DATE, customer_name = #{customerName}, description = #{description}, kernel_version = #{kernelVersion}, status = #{status}, category = #{category}, key_site = #{keySite}, site_type = #{siteType}, mgmt_deploy = #{mgmtDeploy}, kernel_deploy = #{kernelDeploy}, rl = #{rl}, ops_ticket = #{opsTicket}, ecare_ticket = #{ecareTicket}, biz_interrupt = #{bizInterrupt}, urgent_recover = #{urgentRecover}, remark = #{remark}, has_alarm = #{hasAlarm}, alarm_trigger = #{alarmTrigger}, find_remark = #{findRemark}, perceive_time = NULLIF(#{perceiveTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, create_time = NULLIF(#{createTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, swat_start_time = NULLIF(#{swatStartTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, bound_time = NULLIF(#{boundTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, biz_recover_time = NULLIF(#{bizRecoverTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, full_recover_time = NULLIF(#{fullRecoverTime},'')::TIMESTAMP, time_remark = #{timeRemark}, doc_link = #{docLink}, screen_link = #{screenLink}, had_plan = #{hadPlan}, has_plan = #{hasPlan}, plan_name = #{planName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
